    Description
    void
    initialize()
    This contains lambda expression to populate the table This initializes the table and populates the values into the corresponding columns.
    void
    onActionAddApp(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    This method takes the user to the add appointment view, where the user can add a new appointment.
    void
    onActionAddCustomer(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    This method allows users to add a new customer, taking the user to the customer view.
    void
    onActionDeleteApp(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    This method allows users to delete an appointment.
    void
    onActionDeleteCustomer(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    This method allows users to delete a customer.
    void

    This includes a lambda expression.

    This method will allow the user to go to the appointment view and modify the data.
    void
    onActionModifyCustomer(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    This method allows users to modify existing customer and takes the user to the customer view.
    void
    onActionViewReports(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    This method takes the user to the report view.
    void
    onActionViewToggle(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    This method changes the table view.

      public mainViewController()

  • Method Details

    • onActionAddApp

      public void onActionAddApp(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method takes the user to the add appointment view, where the user can add a new appointment.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      IOException

    • onActionModifyApp

      public void onActionModifyApp(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method will allow the user to go to the appointment view and modify the data. If there is no selected appointment, an alert box will show.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      IOException

    • onActionDeleteApp

      public void onActionDeleteApp(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws SQLException
      This method allows users to delete an appointment. If no appointment is selected, an alert will show. When a user selects an appointment, and clicks delete, a confirmation box will appear asking the user if they are sure they want to delete. When a user confirms, another dialog box will appear confirming the deletion with the ID and type listed.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • onActionAddCustomer

      public void onActionAddCustomer(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method allows users to add a new customer, taking the user to the customer view.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      IOException

    • onActionModifyCustomer

      public void onActionModifyCustomer(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method allows users to modify existing customer and takes the user to the customer view. If no customer is selected, an alert box will show.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      IOException

    • onActionDeleteCustomer

      public void onActionDeleteCustomer(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws SQLException
      This method allows users to delete a customer. A confirmation box will appear to confirm with the user that this is their intended action. If no customer is selected, an alert will show.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • onActionViewReports

      public void onActionViewReports(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method takes the user to the report view.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -
      Throws:
      IOException

    • onActionExit

      public void onActionExit(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      This includes a lambda expression. This method allows users to exit the program.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -

    • onActionViewToggle

      public void onActionViewToggle(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      This method changes the table view.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent -

    • initialize

      public void initialize() throws SQLException
      This contains lambda expression to populate the table This initializes the table and populates the values into the corresponding columns.
      Throws:
      SQLException
